channel.name: HL7_ADT_Receiver

properties.query: INSERT INTO RawMessages (MessageControlId, RawHL7, Status) VALUES (${messageControlId}, ${rawHL7}, 'RECEIVED')

-- 1. Temp table to capture changes CREATE TABLE #changes ( PatientId VARCHAR(50), ActionType VARCHAR(10),
OldFirstName VARCHAR(100), NewFirstName VARCHAR(100),
OldLastName VARCHAR(100), NewLastName VARCHAR(100),
OldGender VARCHAR(20), NewGender VARCHAR(20),
OldDoctor VARCHAR(100), NewDoctor VARCHAR(100) );
-- 2. MERGE (UPSERT) MERGE INTO Patients AS target USING (SELECT ${id} AS Id, ${firstName} AS FirstName, ${lastName} AS LastName, ${fullName} AS FullName, ${gender} AS Gender, TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ${birthDate}) AS BirthDate, ${doctor} AS Doctor ) AS source ON target.Id = source.Id
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET FirstName = source.FirstName, LastName = source.LastName, FullName = source.FullName, Gender = source.Gender, BirthDate = source.BirthDate, Doctor = source.Doctor
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (Id, FirstName, LastName, FullName, Gender, BirthDate, Doctor) VALUES (source.Id, source.FirstName, source.LastName, source.FullName, source.Gender, source.BirthDate, source.Doctor)
-- 3. Capture old/new values OUTPUT inserted.Id, $action, deleted.FirstName, inserted.FirstName, deleted.LastName, inserted.LastName, deleted.Gender, inserted.Gender, deleted.Doctor, inserted.Doctor
INTO #changes;
-- 4. Insert audit (combined diff + versioning) INSERT INTO PatientAudit ( PatientId, ActionType, OldData, -- will store combined diff JSON NewData, -- kept NULL (optional) SourceSystem, MessageType, EventType, VersionNumber ) SELECT c.PatientId, c.ActionType,
-- ✅ Combined diff JSON ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISNULL(c.OldFirstName,'') <> ISNULL(c.NewFirstName,'') THEN JSON_QUERY( CONCAT( '{"old":"', c.OldFirstName, '","new":"', c.NewFirstName, '"}' ) ) END AS FirstName,
CASE WHEN ISNULL(c.OldLastName,'') <> ISNULL(c.NewLastName,'') THEN JSON_QUERY( CONCAT( '{"old":"', c.OldLastName, '","new":"', c.NewLastName, '"}' ) ) END AS LastName,
CASE WHEN ISNULL(c.OldGender,'') <> ISNULL(c.NewGender,'') THEN JSON_QUERY( CONCAT( '{"old":"', c.OldGender, '","new":"', c.NewGender, '"}' ) ) END AS Gender,
CASE WHEN ISNULL(c.OldDoctor,'') <> ISNULL(c.NewDoctor,'') THEN JSON_QUERY( CONCAT( '{"old":"', c.OldDoctor, '","new":"', c.NewDoctor, '"}' ) ) END AS Doctor
FOR JSON PATH, WITHOUT_ARRAY_WRAPPER ) AS CombinedDiff,
NULL, -- optional (can drop later) ${sourceSystem}, ${messageType}, ${eventType},
-- ✅ Versioning ISNULL(( SELECT MAX(pa.VersionNumber) FROM PatientAudit pa WHERE pa.PatientId = c.PatientId ), 0) + 1
FROM #changes c
-- ✅ Skip "no change" WHERE ( ISNULL(c.OldFirstName,'') <> ISNULL(c.NewFirstName,'') OR ISNULL(c.OldLastName,'') <> ISNULL(c.NewLastName,'') OR ISNULL(c.OldGender,'') <> ISNULL(c.NewGender,'') OR ISNULL(c.OldDoctor,'') <> ISNULL(c.NewDoctor,'') );
-- 5. Cleanup DROP TABLE #changes;
UPDATE RawMessages SET Status = 'PROCESSED' WHERE MessageControlId = ${messageControlId} AND status<> 'ERROR'

channel.preprocessingScript: // Modify the message variable below to pre process data return message;
